title: senecio doriiformis subsp. orientalis
intro: Senecio doriiformis subsp. orientalis, also known as Oriental Jacob's Ladder, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio doriiformis subsp. orientalis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including bronchitis, colds, and indigestion.
